page: Microsoft Azure EC96ads_v6 is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the ECadsv6 server family. It is equipped with 96 dedicated vCPUs powered by an AMD processor and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The system features 672.0 GB of system memory, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 7.0 GB per vCPU. For local storage, the instance includes 2458 GB of local disk capacity and is capable of utilizing Premium Storage.

This instance is designed for memory-intensive workloads that require substantial local storage capacity. The combination of 96 dedicated vCPUs and 672.0 GB of RAM makes it suitable for large-scale databases, enterprise applications, and memory-heavy data processing tasks. The inclusion of 2458 GB of local storage provides a high-density resource profile, offering qualitative cost efficiency by reducing the need for external storage attachments for temporary or caching data. It does not include integrated GPU hardware or complimentary public IPv4 addresses.
description: The Microsoft Azure EC96ads_v6 is an x86_64 architecture server instance from the ECadsv6 family, designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads. Powered by an AMD processor and managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance features 96 dedicated vCPUs and 672.0 GB of RAM, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 7.0 GB per vCPU. It includes 2458 GB of local disk storage and supports Premium Storage configurations, though it lacks dedicated GPU hardware and complimentary public IPv4 addresses. The high density of memory and local storage provides a cost-efficient profile for resource-heavy applications by minimizing reliance on external storage for caching. This server is optimized for large-scale databases, memory-heavy data processing, and enterprise application hosting.
og_description: Microsoft Azure EC96ads_v6 is an x86_64 memory-optimized server with 96 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 672 GB RAM, and 2458 GB local storage, designed for large databases and enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure EC96ads_v6 is an x86_64 server featuring 96 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 672 GB RAM, and 2458 GB local storage for memory-intensive workloads.
tagline: A high-capacity memory-optimized instance featuring ninety-six dedicated cores and substantial local storage for demanding enterprise database workloads.

672.0 GB of system memory providing 7.0 GB per core
